Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Votes.VoteType: Favorable refer to committee Ways and Means

Title: Requires a collecting officer of taxes to accept payments of tax, including any interest due thereon, rounded to the nearest five cent denomination
Summary: Requires a collecting officer of taxes to accept payments of tax, including any interest due thereon, rounded to the nearest five cent denomination for taxpayers seeking to pay therefor with legal tender.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to requiring a collecting officer of taxes to accept payments of tax, including any interest due thereon, rounded to the nearest five cent denomination
